content.en:
In front of the forbidden land of the sea of bones.

Ye Tian didn't hesitate for long, and resolutely stepped into the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones.

Bang!!!!

Endless pressure hits, I don't know how many times stronger than the pressure from the outside world, if an ordinary domain ancestor enters here, I am afraid that he will be crushed by the pressure in an instant.

In such a place, it is difficult for the ancestors to exert the destructive power of the outside world.

Of course, he will be suppressed, and the bone soldiers and bone generals in the Bone Sea Forbidden Land will also be suppressed, so they are all very fair.

And as soon as Ye Tian entered the Bone Sea Forbidden Land at this time, he immediately attracted the attention of the bone soldiers inside the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

Suddenly, a large number of bone soldiers poured in.

I saw that the ten bone generals accelerated thousands of bone soldiers to surround and kill, but the bone king did not move.

The Bone King is probably too lazy to do it, after all, if an Ancestor comes and makes a move, if an Ancestor sends an avatar to harass him at every turn, wouldn't the Bone Kings be annoyed to death?

Moreover, ten bone generals plus thousands of bone soldiers were enough to besiege and kill a top ancestor.

If you really can't beat it, the Bone King will naturally make a move.

Ye Tian's purpose this time was very clear, kill a few bone soldiers first, seize the bone beads and leave.

He is not greedy, otherwise he would not even think of a bone bead.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian used a Ultimate Ancestral Technique, using the Ancestral Armor Ancestral Technique, the Ancestral Armor Defense and the Dao Yi Ultimate Ancestral Technique, the two could be superimposed, which could naturally make his life-saving ability increase greatly.

Immediately, Ye Tian erupted with the Golden Wing Ultimate Ancestor Technique and the Streamer Ultimate Ancestor Technique, and his speed was exerted to the extreme, rushing towards the bone soldiers, and then he immediately performed the Hegemony Ultimate Ancestor Technique and the Extreme Arm Ultimate Ancestor Technique, and slammed into a bone soldier with one punch!

Boom!!

This bone soldier was blown up by Ye Tian's punch, leaving a bone bead behind.

Immediately, Ye Tian put away this bone bead.

At the same time, these thousands of bone soldiers and ten bone generals shot out in unison, even though Ye Tian's speed was fast, he was still hit by some attacks.

However, his defense was too strong, the two defensive Ultimate Ancestral Skills were superimposed, and the Dao Yi Ultimate Ancestral Technique was broken, but the second layer of defensive Ancestral Armor Ultimate Ancestral Technique was not broken, so he only suffered a little light, and it didn't matter much.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian struck a backhand blow and shattered another bone soldier and obtained the second bone bead.

"Looking for !! Death"

Roars came from the depths of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

Obviously, Ye Tian killed the two bone soldiers, angering the bone kings.

Thundered!!!!

Ten Bone Kings shuttled from the depths of the Bone King Forbidden Land, each of them was very powerful, in Ye Tian's eyes, they were all stronger than the Destruction Ancestor, at least three or four times as powerful as the Destruction Ancestor.

Who knows how many Bone Kings there are, once he is surrounded by the Ten Bone Kings, he is afraid that it will be difficult for him to escape.

Although he was not worried about the safety of the copy body, once the copy body fell, the bone bead could not be brought back.

So, after Ye Tian escaped again, and after killing another bone soldier, he quickly escaped from the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones.

These bone kings didn't dare to chase out of the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, there seemed to be any restrictions, as for what the restrictions were, it was not clear.

"Three bone beads, not bad!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

But this time, it was the first time he entered the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, and those bone kings were careless, which allowed him to obtain three bone beads at one time.

Next time, I'm afraid it will be difficult for him to have such an opportunity.

Because once he enters the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, the Bone Kings will inevitably make a move.

"No matter, let's refine these three bone beads first and see the effect!"

Ye Tian's copied body returned to the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm and handed over the three bone beads to the body's hand.

Subsequently, Ye Tian's body began to absorb and refine a bone bead.

Rumble!!!!!

Countless pure energy poured into Ye Tian's Endless Ancestor Body, quickly refining the Ancestor Body, nourishing the soul, and strengthening the Ancestor's power.

"This works ......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Compared to the effect of the bone beads, those Silent Treasures are simply rubbish!

"The top ancestors don't dare to enter the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones, they will fall if they are not careful, and even if they do, it will be difficult to kill a bone soldier. Otherwise, the Ancestors would have taken risks. That is, I, the replicating body is not afraid of death, and the forbidden land of the sea of bones is a treasure land for me, not a forbidden land!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian had been refining bone beads.

His cultivation is constantly improving, and his strength is also improving rapidly.

Almost 10,000 years, he could refine a bone bead, and now that 30,000 years have passed, all three bone beads have been refined.

At this time, Ye Tian's strength increased by one percent.

Don't underestimate the strength of Yicheng, it has only been 30,000 years to increase the strength of Yicheng, what if there are enough bone beads?

Moreover, Ye Tian had already reached the top top Ancestor combat power, and at such an extent, he could also increase his strength by one percent, which was very terrifying!

"I must get more bone beads! Maybe with my foundation, I can have a combat power comparable to that of the strongest ancestor at the top ancestor level!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, Ye Tian's copy body came to the Bone Sea Forbidden Land again.

This time, as soon as Ye Tian entered the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, the Ten Bone Kings were dispatched to besiege Ye Tian.

All around, there are also a large number of bone soldiers and bone generals to assist.

It can be said that Ye Tian was surrounded by many things.

In the end, Ye Tian desperately killed a bone soldier at all costs, obtained a bone bead, and escaped with a body that was almost annihilated.

Such an injury was almost certain for the Ancestor to die, because the Ancestor Origin was almost exhausted.

But this is a copy of the body, so Ye Tian doesn't care.

After obtaining a bone bead, Ye Tian's cultivation improved a lot.

However, Ye Tian knew very well that the next time he entered the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, it was estimated that he would not face ten bone kings, but more bone kings.

So, Ye Tianna took a copy of his body and tested it to see what the strength of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land was.

When Ye Tian entered the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones again, he really encountered twenty bone kings and was besieged and killed.

-------------------

"No, if you copy the body and enter again, the result will still be the fate of being besieged, so you can only take another way!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His other method was to copy the body of the Bone Clan and enter the Forbidden Land of the Bone Sea as the Bone Clan.

"You can't copy the Bone King, the Bone King has a very high status in the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, and suddenly a strange Bone King appears, and it is easy to recognize. If you copy the body of a skeleton, you are less likely to be exposed. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, even if he copied the body of the bone soldier, he would not appear in front of the other bone soldiers, but would hide and inquire about the situation of the bone clan.

After all, the bone soldier he copied, once he met the bone soldier himself, he was immediately exposed.

Ye Tian had been fighting with those bone soldiers for a long time, so he could naturally replicate their bodies.

Ye Tian randomly chose a bone soldier and prepared to start copying.

However.

When he copied it, the accident appeared.

Rumble!!!!

The bone soldier's copied body was directly annihilated.

It was forcibly annihilated by the origin of the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Bone soldiers, not allowed to appear in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

This is the reason why the bone soldiers, bone generals, and bone kings dare not come out, and they will be annihilated when they come out.
